intent: Compact 2-bedroom on a wide 16x9 lot. Combined great room (living + dining merged) and a kitchen share the right column, splitting the 5 m buildable depth between them. Both bedrooms reach the great room directly — no hallway. Common bath sits at the rear sharing a plumbing wall with the kitchen.
must_haves: great room replacing separate living + dining
kitchen and great room stack splits the 5 m depth on the right side
common bath off the great room with kitchen-side wet core
no hallway — both bedrooms touch the great room directly
